title: Dungeons Content 2
description: Dungeons Content II is a mod that adds content from a new game that has not yet been released and is a direct continuation of MCD. At the moment, only the new hostile mob Warden Boss is available
body:
DungeonsContent II is a mod that adds content from a new game that has not yet been released and is a direct continuation of MCD. At the moment, only the new hostile mob Warden Boss is available
